THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GONZALEZ, SUZETTE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TIGUA, CHRISTIAN V $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, APPELLANT MAY PAY OFF JUDGMENT IN $200.00 MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS DUE ON THE 1ST OR NEXT BUSINESS DAY OF EACH MONTH BEGINNING 1-1-2018. FAILURE TO MAKE A TIMELY PAYMENT SHALL CAUSE THE BALANCE DUE PLUS POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST THEREON TO BECOME IMMEDIATELY DUE AND PAYABLE. THERE IS NO PRE-PAYMENT PENALTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELLIOTT MYLES; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (525) PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. JUDGMENT CREDITOR SUZETTE GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR CHRISTIAN TIGUA IS PRESENT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant: Christian V. Tigua, present
Respondent/Plaintiff:Suzette Gonzalez, present

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Christian V. Tigua, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his own behalf

No Exhibits submitted by appellant

Respondent requests an installment judgment if judgment is issued against him at payments of $200.00 monthly. Plaintiff/respondent does not object to an installment judgment.

Suzette Gonzalez, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf

The following documentary evidence is introduced
Group Exhibit A (evidence of vehicle repairs statements, tow receipts, SFMTA Tickets for total of $1010.00; copy of statement from infinity financial services)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Elloitt Myles; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (525)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Judgment Entered
